layman_headline: The crypto market is fearful and alts are bleeding — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a 'Fear' state with a score of just 26 out of 100. Bitcoin dominance is high at 56.3%, which means money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin. Most altcoins on our watchlist are in downtrends with bearish chart structures. While a few coins like ZRO and TRUMP are near oversold levels, none of them have confirmed a reversal yet — catching a falling knife in this environment is risky.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines and keep your cash ready. Wait for a confirmed bounce or a shift in market fear before entering any new positions. The best trades come from patience, not urgency.
expert_reasoning: The market environment is hostile for alt entries: Fear & Greed at 26, BTC dominance at 56.3%, and nearly every candidate below all major moving averages. ZRO stands out with RSI at 30.83 and a remarkable 16.5x risk/reward ratio at current levels, but the chart bias is -0.70 (bearish) with no MACD cross or bullish candlestick reversal confirmation. TRUMP at RSI 29 is deeply oversold but has negative headline risk from the CryptoSlate disclosure article and a -0.70 chart bias. ETHFI has the best chart bias (+0.60) but sits right at resistance ($0.40) with terrible R/R of 0.11x — not a swing entry. BONK and GRASS have sharp declines suggesting potential mean reversion, but their bearish chart patterns (-1.40 and -0.90) signal continued selling pressure. The prudent move is to wait for confirmation before deploying capital.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.3% continues to crush altcoin performance — this could persist for weeks
Fear & Greed at 26 has been improving but could easily reverse if BTC drops below $63K
No volume breakout signals detected in any candidate — all moves lack conviction
watch_list: ZRO price action at $0.90 support — a bounce with volume here would trigger a BUY
BTC price stability above $64K — any breakdown could drag all alts further down
Fear & Greed index crossing above 30 — would signal improving risk appetite for entries
market_context: Bitcoin is consolidating near $64K with modest weekly gains (+2.25%) while altcoins broadly bleed. The market is in 'Fear' territory with BTC dominance rising, making this a treacherous environment for alt swing trades without confirmed reversal signals.
context_banner: Market fear and high BTC dominance create a hostile alt environment — disciplined patience outperforms forced entries.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 ('Fear') with an improving trend from 24 weekly average — not yet bullish enough to warrant aggressive alt entries but shows the worst may be passing.
ZRO RSI at 30.83 and TRUMP RSI at 29.04 are approaching/in oversold territory, but without bullish reversal candles these remain falling knives.
Trump crypto disclosure article creates headline risk that could weigh on TRUMP token specifically, removing it from consideration despite oversold RSI.
Bitcoin described as 'nearing late stages of bear market' by Jamie Coutts — if true, patience now could yield strong alt entries once BTC dominance peaks and reverses.
7 of 9 candidates below all major moving averages with bearish chart bias scores — broad alt market weakness confirms this is not the time to force entries.
